design_concept: Premium Editorial Photography Magazine. Awwwards SOTD level. Bold, kinetic, and cohesive. Avoids typical generic SaaS aesthetics. Relies heavily on typography, motion, negative space, and a highly constrained, sophisticated color palette.

typography.font_pairings_rationale: Cormorant Garamond brings a warm, elegant, editorial serif feel perfect for wedding photography, while Manrope provides clean, highly legible, modern geometric contrast for UI elements and body text.

hierarchy_rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl+ tracking-tighter leading-none (used for hero masked reveals)

colors.rules: CRITICAL: NO DARK THEME. Use this palette strictly. Avoid raw #000000 or generic grays.

cream.usage: Primary background color for all pages.

sage_green.usage: Primary brand color. Used for large typographic statements, footer backgrounds, and secondary sections.

copper.usage: Accent color. Used for hover states, buttons, links, and the custom cursor.

ink.usage: Primary text color. Dark enough for 4.5:1 contrast, warm enough to fit the cream background.

surface.usage: Used sparingly for isolated cards, lightboxes, or admin panel containers to create slight depth against cream.

visual_enhancers.textures: Include a subtle noise/grain overlay div covering the screen with pointer-events-none and opacity-5 to simulate magazine paper/film grain.
visual_enhancers.radii: Mixed approach. Photos should predominantly have sharp edges (rounded-none) to feel like printed photographs or slightly rounded (rounded-sm) for a polished look. Buttons and chips should be fully rounded (rounded-full) for high contrast in shape.
visual_enhancers.borders: Delicate 1px borders using ink/10 or copper/20. No heavy borders.

motion.scrolling: MUST use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. The app must feel heavy and premium.
motion.hero_reveal: Masked line-by-line reveal for the H1 on load. Use Framer Motion (initial y: 100%, animate y: 0) inside an overflow-hidden wrapper for each line.
motion.scroll_reveals: Staggered fade-up and slight Y-translation (e.g., y: 40 to y: 0) as sections enter the viewport.
motion.parallax: Use Framer Motion's useScroll and useTransform for a subtle Y-axis parallax on the hero image/video and large gallery images.
motion.cursor: Implement a custom cursor tracking the mouse position. Turns into a 'View' magnifier (copper dot expanding) when hovering over gallery items.

layouts.spacing: Extremely generous. Sections should be padded with py-24 to py-32. Let the elements breathe.
layouts.hero: 100vh. Full-bleed background video with a subtle bg-ink/20 overlay. Do NOT make the overlay too dark. Massive typography anchored to bottom-left.
layouts.gallery_grid: Tetris/Asymmetric grid. DO NOT USE perfect square grids. Mix col-span-12, col-span-8, col-span-4. Use explicit aspect ratios (aspect-[4/5], aspect-[16/9]) to create tension.
layouts.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee. Very slow, elegant motion. Text: 'Weddings · Pre-Wedding · Cinematic · Sambhaji Nagar · Est. 2026'. Color: sage_green background with cream text, or cream bg with copper text.

components_strategy.marketing_pages: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the landing page and galleries to allow maximum creative freedom with grids and overlaps.
components_strategy.admin_panel: Use Shadcn components heavily (Tables, Inputs, Dialogs, Cards) to build a robust, clean CMS experience. Protect via a simple mock login state.
components_strategy.nav: Fixed header, mix of glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-md bg-cream/70) but must have 1px bottom border (border-ink/10). Include Logo, links, and contact chip.
components_strategy.video_player_cards: For cinematic section, display large 16:9 thumbnails with a central 'Play' button icon. On click, open a fullscreen overlay/lightbox video player.

pages.Home: Hero (Video) -> Editorial Marquee -> Numbered Chapters (01. Approach, 02. Craft) -> Featured Asymmetric Grid -> Footer
pages.Wedding_Gallery: Immersive image gallery. Mix of portrait and landscape shots with lightbox capability.
pages.Pre_Wedding_Gallery: Similar to Wedding, focused on outdoor/nature aesthetics.
pages.Cinematic_Gallery: Video thumbnails in a staggered layout.
pages.Contact: No forms. Pure typography with large 'Let's Talk' heading and elegant chips/buttons linking to Phone, WhatsApp, Email, Instagram.
pages.Admin_Dashboard: Sidebar or top nav (Dashboard, Weddings, Pre-Weddings, Cinematic). Table view of assets with Add/Delete/Edit actions.

testing.data_testid_rules: Add data-testid to all interactive elements. e.g., data-testid='nav-link-wedding', data-testid='gallery-img-1', data-testid='admin-login-submit'

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic SaaS aesthetics. Force yourself to build a high-fashion, editorial layout. Do not center everything. Emphasize asymmetry.
Do NOT use Space Grotesk or Inter for headings. Strictly use Cormorant Garamond.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical. Don't let elements touch.
Ensure the hero background video works properly with a dark overlay to maintain text readability.
For the custom cursor, hide the default cursor on desktop using 'cursor-none' and use a framer-motion driven div tracking mouse coordinates.
Mock the admin panel functionality cleanly using React state or standard frontend approaches if the backend isn't strictly requested to persist. Prioritize the UI experience.
Use react-icons or lucide-react for UI icons, but keep icon usage minimal. Let typography and photos lead.
